item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-n06","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant stayed in direct execution mode and gave an immediate process-change judgment instead of firing a triage framework.
